<h2>India Physics</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Space Daily:</strong> On July 18, 2026, Skyroot Aerospace&#x27;s Vikram-1 became the first privately developed Indian rocket to reach orbit from Sriharikota after a 35-minute hold — the visible result of six years of reforms that opened orbital launch to private builders alongside ISRO - Space Daily<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiVEFVX3lxTE1JeGU2N0dteHpQay1GejlQbWJYU1ZSUnlQdFA4Q1lRdkhLT01ZemJCNGl0RDdVMVI1NU1YaDExOEJmTmNUMnJBcGtTZGN5UENTMFdMag?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a></span></li>

</ul>
